meta.title: Maralma · Gastronomic Events
meta.description: We're not a catering company. We're a gastronomic experience. Weddings, corporate and private events in Cádiz and across Spain.

hero.tagline: The essence of sea and land, served with soul.

claim.subtitle: Fine dining · One event per day · 100% customised

weddings.title: Weddings
weddings.desc: Cocktail or banquet. One wedding per day. Your story, your menu, your day.

corporate.title: Corporate
corporate.desc: Presentations, openings, gala dinners and corporate events.

private.title: Private
private.desc: Anniversaries, birthdays, baptisms, communions, family celebrations...

cocktail.subtitle: Freedom · Movement · Experience
cocktail.desc: Gastronomic stations, live show cooking, and a free-flowing experience where your guests enjoy at their own pace.
items: Custom open bar and late-night snacks

banquet.subtitle: Elegance · Table · Memory
banquet.desc: Author's tasting menu, seasonal local produce, and impeccable table service to remember.

page.hero_subtitle: We design signature menus that tell your story: from the welcome cocktail to the last toast.
page.phrase: The wedding they'll remember isn't the most expensive — it's the one that tasted best.

why.title: 1 wedding per day
why.desc: We only do one wedding a day. Your event gets all our attention.

why.title: Custom menu
why.desc: We meet with you, you taste the menu, and we adjust it until it's perfect.

why.title: Chef on-site
why.desc: Juan cooks at your wedding. We don't subcontract, we don't delegate what matters.

page.cta_body: Every couple is different. We'd love to hear you and design something unique for you.

items.title: One event per day
items.desc: The whole team, all the attention, all the energy focused on you.

items.title: 100% personalised
items.desc: We like to meet you first. Your story inspires your menu.

items.title: Fine dining
items.desc: Restaurant-level gastronomy brought to your celebration.

items.title: Nationwide
items.desc: From Cádiz, we go wherever you need to celebrate.

reviews.eyebrow: What those who lived it say
reviews.title: Why do they choose us?

items.text: The food was SPECTACULAR. Many guests told us it was the best wedding food they had ever tasted. From the very first moment we knew we were in good hands.
items.name: Germán & Carmen

items.text: They adapted to all our changes with a smile. The team is incredibly professional. Every guest was impressed by the presentation and flavour of each dish.
items.name: Laura & Marcos

items.text: We hired Maralma for my mother's 50th birthday. They designed a fully bespoke menu. Impeccable presentation and exceptional service. I recommend them without hesitation.
items.name: Ana Reyes

items.text: They catered our product launch. Absolutely everything was perfect. The gastronomy took the event to another level. We will definitely repeat.
items.name: Pablo Moreno · CEO

items.text: Our daughter's baptism was magical thanks to them. Miriam coordinated every detail with a calmness that was contagious. And the food... unforgettable.
items.name: Sofía & Javier

juan.name: Juan
juan.bio: He gives free rein to the kitchen so every dish tells more than just a recipe. He studies each idea and brings it to life with his own hands.

miriam.name: Miriam
miriam.quote: She is order, care and trust.
miriam.bio: She organises, manages and paves the way for every client. She cares for every detail, making sure everything flows as if magic took care of it.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.cta_phrase: We care for every texture, every aroma, every moment.

cta.title: Tell us about your celebration.
cta.desc: Before any proposal, we love to get to know you. Your idea, your style, your story.

contact.title: Tell us about your event.
contact.subtitle: Before making any proposal, we like to get to know you. Your story, your tastes, your vision.

sidebar.note: We only do one event per day to guarantee the highest quality in every service.

form.title: Contact form
form.subtitle: Fill in the form and we'll get back to you within 24h.
form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your event, your food preferences, the venue you have in mind...
form.successText: Thank you for contacting Maralma. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

about.title: The story behind the flavor.
about.subtitle: Sea and Soul. Two words that sum up everything we do.

items.title: Produce
items.desc: From the land and sea of Cádiz to your table. Local suppliers, seasonal and traceable.

items.title: Customization
items.desc: Every menu is created from scratch. No fixed menu, just your event.

items.title: Experience
items.desc: We don't serve dishes, we create moments. Every detail matters.

events.title: Your occasion, your way.
events.subtitle: Corporate and private events with top-tier gastronomic proposals.

corporate.title: Corporate events
corporate.desc: Conferences, incentives, product launches or gala dinners that leave a mark.

private.title: Private events
private.desc: Birthdays, baptisms, communions, anniversaries. We bring the flavor, you bring the joy.

page.phrase: The best deals are sealed around a great table.
page.cta_title: Tell us what you have in mind.
page.cta_body: Let's design a custom proposal for your event together.
